audit_type: Round 5+ deep hunt — sentinel collision attack vector

rounds.angle: Sentinel collision attack — user string mimics SVTK type tag

evidence.attack_implication: Player who can inject any string into game state (inventory name, chat message, custom skill name) can forge type-encoded sentinels and pass forensic divergence checks.

fix.string_path: prepareForJson string branch: if input starts with CANON_PREFIX_RESERVED → prepend CANON_STR_ESCAPE_PREFIX. Recursive: each escape adds another layer.
fix.key_path: escapeUserKey() helper — RESERVED_KEY_MAP rename OR (if user key starts with __SVTK_) escape with CANON_STR_ESCAPE_PREFIX. Symbol-keyed encoder unchanged.
